_schema.description: Proportional composition data for a pie chart. Maximum 5 slices — if your dataset has more categories, either consolidate smaller ones into an 'Other' bucket or switch to a 100% stacked bar chart. Values do not need to sum to 100; the chart normalises them. Provide raw counts or percentages — either works.

fields.label: string — category name (keep short, ≤20 chars)
fields.value: number — raw count or percentage share

_schema.replace: Swap labels and values with your real composition data. If you have more than 5 meaningful categories, collapse the smallest into 'Other'.
